acceptance_tests.title: Chat-driven task execution
steps: Open the UI and start a new chat
Send a simple request (e.g., list files)
Observe the agent response and tool execution
Verify the response and logs appear in chat

acceptance_tests.title: Cowork folder scoping
steps: Enable Cowork mode in Settings
Open Cowork Manager and add /a0 as allowlist
Ask the agent to access a path outside /a0
Verify approval is required or action blocked

acceptance_tests.title: Cowork approvals per thread
steps: Trigger an impactful tool (e.g., code_execution_tool)
Open Cowork Manager for the current thread
Approve the pending action
Verify the action continues after approval

acceptance_tests.title: MCP configuration
steps: Open Settings → MCP
Paste a valid MCP config JSON
Save settings
Verify MCP tools are available in the system prompt

acceptance_tests.title: Gmail test utility
steps: Configure Gmail OAuth in the account manager
Open the Gmail Test Utility
Send a test email
Verify delivery and success response
